description: fabindia's natural, craft-based pieces reference ethnic garments and fabric.  This stylish stole perfectly captures the traditional mood of the moment with its colour patterning. Twist it into a stylish knot or wrap it around your shoulders and feel the luxe fabric caressing your skin. Approximate Length: 200 cmWoven stole made of blended silk and wool fabricOrange, pink and mustard colour patternTassels at the edgesWash careDry clean only
